title: Nouland flare
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Plant |image= |name=Nouland flare |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Nonsentient]][[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] |class= |origin= |found= |habitat= |lifespan= |description=Large and very [[Fire/Legends|flammable]] |edible= |inedible= |nutrition= |effects= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Nouland flare. They're used some places to smoke out intruders.''"
"''Quite literally, I see.''"
"''Exactly. Nonsentient, not really dangerous, but big and scary and very flammable. Must have been installed sometime after Marcross stopped coming here.|Emperor's Hand Mara Jade Skywalker and Daric LaRone|}} '''Nouland flares''' were nonsentient vines that were used to guard certain restricted areas. They were not very dangerous. They were threatening-looking, flammable, and would burn when hit with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt. [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Barshnis Choard|Choard's]] [[Shelkonwa governor's palace|estate]] on [[Shelkonwa]] had a number of Nouland flares growing on the property. ==Behind the scenes== Nouland flare first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2007]] novel [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]. ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Noulandgewächs |pl=Flara Noulanda }} [[Category:Vines]]
